records.delta_text: We would like to know whether there exists such an archaic literary tradition known as "A Song of Iceand Fire". (Note: You must have at least 3,000 words.) The Librarians can't help but speculate about how it was formed—how long has history passed? How many letters had their name changed from 'Tis possible some day! Why did any writing survive during this time? What might we learn through our experience with each individual poem or word…or
